expected_effect: Increase overall mean_edge from the screen_0003 line without giving back the fee-discipline and low-retail gains already achieved.
expected_failure_signature: If high-decile and overall edge do not rise after harder toxic-side charging, the line is too muted to clear margin; if arb-loss ratio rises, the floor has been cut too far.
expected_win_condition: Lift mean_edge materially above screen_0003 while staying under the fee guardrail and keeping low-retail at or above its new frontier.
hidden_coupling_removed: Even after v2, too much event and hazard spend is still trapped in the shared floor instead of charging the toxic side directly.
rationale: Exploit screen_0003, which already hit the low-retail and fee targets, by keeping the capped floor skim discipline but pushing more hazard and burst spend into the toxic-side overlay instead of the shared floor.
title: Baseline split with harder toxic overlay
why_not_coefficient_retune: This keeps the same two-channel topology but reassigns more protective spend from the baseline floor to the toxic overlay while holding the skim discipline fixed.
